title: More Menu (Part 1/2)
heading: Tenders
text:
| Title | Description | Start Date | End Date | File |
| Notice inviting e-tender for the period of financial years 2021-22,2022-23 & 2023-24 of the licence of foreign liquor warehouse to be effective at suitable premises. | Notice inviting e-tender for the period of financial year 2021-22,2022-23 & 2023-24 of the licence of foreign liquior warehouse to be effective at suitable permises as per the Tripura Exice Act and Rules arranged by the interested parties within the board area where Foreign liquor Warehouse is proposed to be established on either side of the AA Road from Motorstand to khayerpur Trijunction ,Agartala. | 03/04/2021 | 24/04/2021 | |
| Notice inviting e-tender for the period of financial years 2021-22,2022-23 & 2023-24 of the licence of foreign liquor warehouse to be effective at suitable premises. | Notice inviting e-tender for the period of financial year 2021-22,2022-23 & 2023-24 of the licence of foreign liquior warehouse to be effective at suitable permises as per the Tripura Exice Act and Rules arranged by the interested parties within the board area where Foreign liquor Warehouse is proposed to be established on either side of Central Road from Maharajganj Bazar to bypass to either side of bypass from Bankumari to Amtali P.S. | 03/04/2021 | 24/04/2021 | |
| Notice inviting e-tender for the period of financial year 2021-22,2022-23 & 2023-24 of the licence of foreign liquior warehouse to be effective at suitable permises. | Notice inviting e-tender for the period of financial year 2021-22,2022-23 & 2023-24 of the licence of foreign liquior warehouse to be effective at suitable permises as per the Tripura Exice Act and Rules arranged by the interested parties within the board area where Foreign liquor Warehouse is proposed to be established from RanirBazar to Jirania including Municipal/Nagar Panchayat area under West Tripura District along the National Highway.
